eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Wheeler, OR; at 3:55 PM on JUL 18, 2026 Effective until 4:55 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Level 3 - GO NOW - Evacuate immediately from Pat's Cabin fire North of Hwy 26, East of Cougar Mtn Rd, S of Bear Creek Rd, Zone WHH-068. Wheeler County. 
Nivel 3 - VAYASE AHORA - Evacue inmediatamente de Pat's Cabin fire North of Hwy 26, East of Cougar Mtn Rd, S of Bear Creek Rd, Zone WHH-068.
